attacking_style: Attempts moves on penultimate climbs with teammate support, but lacks finishing power on final HC climbs where sustained effort is required.
team_tactics: Team provides support for attacks on earlier climbs in multi-climb stages, attempting to make moves before final ascents rather than saving energy for summit finishes.
terrain_preference: Struggles on HC category summit finishes requiring sustained high-intensity efforts. The Pantera climb HC finish exposed significant weaknesses in his climbing capacity.
vulnerability: Cannot maintain pace on steep HC climbs when the race intensifies. Shows pattern of losing time and falling back in GC on hardest mountain stages.
key_patterns: Attacks fail on penultimate climbs, unable to sustain efforts through stage conclusion.
Loses significant time on HC summit finishes, consistently falling back in GC rankings.
Team support deployed early in stages, but rider cannot capitalize on positioning.
form_trajectory: negative: Multiple failed attacks and time losses on crucial mountain stages indicate declining form or insufficient climbing strength for Grand Tour GC contention during 2017 Vuelta
